description_long: This sconce features a tall, slender vertical pole anchored by a round, sturdy base. Two distinct lamp heads extend horizontally from the central pole at different heights, each with a rounded, dome-shaped shade—one in a dark metallic finish and the other in a lighter, possibly brass or gold tone. The lamp heads are suspended on short, curved arms, giving the fixture a balanced, asymmetrical appearance. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with a possible glass or plastic diffuser inside each lamp head. This fixture is suitable for urban environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or building entrances, where both functional and decorative lighting is desired.
description: A modern, dual-headed sconce with a tall metal pole, round base, and two dome-shaped lamp heads in contrasting metallic finishes. The fixture has a sleek, minimalist design with asymmetrical arms.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lamp heads extending outward at different heights, with the base and central pole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the lamp heads, one behind the other, and the slim profile of the pole and base.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the lamp heads and the curvature of the supporting arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the lamp heads aligned vertically and the base in profile.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a balanced asymmetrical arrangement. The use of contrasting metallic finishes and simple dome-shaped shades gives it a contemporary urban appeal.
